nodes.label: Synthetic Privacy-Preserving Visuals
nodes.rationale: Programmatic React/Remotion graphics, shimmer placeholders, and abstract charts avoid exposing real numbers, names, logos, or operational data.

nodes.label: Site-Matched Motion Identity
nodes.rationale: The videos reuse the website background, orange accent, and IBM Plex Sans Arabic font so the service previews feel native to the site.

nodes.label: Hover-to-Play Strategy
nodes.rationale: Play on mouse enter and pause/reset on mouse leave to reduce battery and data usage.

nodes.label: Mobile Visibility Playback Strategy
nodes.rationale: Use autoplay when a card becomes visible on mobile because hover interaction is unavailable.

nodes.label: Incremental Service Expansion
nodes.rationale: The existing eight service cards can either be replaced by the refined catalog or retained while the six missing capabilities are added.

nodes.label: Prevent Depletion and Forgotten Stagnant Stock
nodes.norm_label: prevent depletion and forgotten stagnant stock
